title: Let's Jeb!
body:
This mod makes `jeb_` sheep drop random colored wool. YAY!

[Check out the gallery for pictures!](https://modrinth.com/mod/letsjeb/gallery)

## Features:
 - `jeb_` sheep drop random colored wool!
 - offspring of `jeb_` sheep receive a random wool color!

## Client/Server
This mod is strictly only required on the server. This allows for vanilla clients to join a server with this mod installed.
If you want to use this mod in your singleplayer world, no problem, just include the mod in your client.
